original_image_tags: A standard tan/brown manila folder, appearing aged, with two hole-punches at the top edge. The folder is mostly blank, showing vertical crease lines. A metal fastener is visible at the bottom center. A strip of adhesive tape is affixed horizontally across the bottom, over which the following markings are present.

elements.description: Brown paper envelope with two hole-punches at top, a fastener at bottom center, a 'CLOSURE' stamp at bottom left, and handwritten numbers '62-83894-376' in blue and red ink at bottom center.

judge.reason: Description B adds specific quoted text ('CLOSURE' stamp and handwritten numbers '62-83894-376') that is completely absent from Description A, which claims the folder is 'mostly blank'.
